# Digitek Solutions

> Local technicians providing CCTV installation, laptop repair, printer servicing, office networking, website design, and digital marketing — with same-day service and a no-fix no-fee guarantee.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Digitek Solutions and core services.
- [About](/about): Our team, values, and 10+ years of experience.
- [Services](/services): Full list of services we offer.
- [Home Security](/services/home-security): CCTV cameras, burglar alarm systems, and digital smart-lock installation.
- [Laptop Repair](/services/laptop): Screen, battery, virus, and hardware repairs for all major brands.
- [Industrial Automation](/services/industrial-automation): Biometric attendance & access, water-pump automation, Wi-Fi display boards, video conferencing setup.
- [Office Networking](/services/networking): Structured cabling, business Wi-Fi, switches, and firewalls.
- [Website Designing](/services/web-design): Modern, mobile-friendly websites for small businesses.
- [Digital Marketing](/services/digital-marketing): SEO, Google Ads, and social media management.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Photos of recent installations and projects.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone +91 98305 04138, email info@digiteksolutions.net.in.
